norwegian: Vi ___ møte deg på stasjonen klokken tre.
english: We will meet you at the station at three o'clock.

norwegian: Jeg ___ kjøpe ny jakke i morgen.
english: I am going to buy a new jacket tomorrow.

norwegian: Det ___ bli mye snø i vinter.
english: There is going to be a lot of snow this winter.

norwegian: Han ___ ikke komme på festen i kveld.
english: He will not come to the party tonight.

norwegian: De skal reise til Bergen neste uke.
english: They are going to travel to Bergen next week.

norwegian: Jeg vil gjerne ha en kopp kaffe.
english: I would like to have a cup of coffee.

norwegian: Det kommer til å bli varmt i helgen.
english: It is going to be warm this weekend.

norwegian: Hun skal begynne på universitetet til høsten.
english: She is going to start university in the autumn.

norwegian: Vi kommer til å trenge mer tid for å fullføre prosjektet.
english: We are going to need more time to finish the project.

norwegian: Jeg skal besøke bestemor neste uke
english: I will visit my grandmother next week

norwegian: Hun kommer til å dra på ferie om sommeren
english: She will go on vacation this summer

norwegian: Jeg skal besøke moren min neste uke
english: I will visit my mother next week

norwegian: Foreldrene mine kommer til å dra på ferie om en måned
english: My parents will go on a vacation in one month

norwegian: Jeg skal reise til Paris neste år
english: I will travel to Paris next year

norwegian: Vi kommer til å studere norsk i morgen
english: We will study Norwegian tomorrow

norwegian: Hun skal jobbe på kontoret hele uken
english: She will work at the office all week

norwegian: Jeg skal gå til butikken i morgen
english: I will go to the store tomorrow

norwegian: Vi kommer til å besøke vennene våre i helgen
english: We will visit our friends this weekend

norwegian: Jeg skal studere i morgen.
english: I will study tomorrow.

norwegian: Hun kommer til å reise neste uke.
english: She will travel next week.

norwegian: De skal jobbe sent i kveld.
english: They will work late tonight.

norwegian: Jeg skal reise til Bergen i morgen.
english: I am going to travel to Bergen tomorrow.

norwegian: Det kommer til å regne i kveld.
english: It is going to rain tonight.

norwegian: Vi skal spise middag klokken seks.
english: We will eat dinner at six.

norwegian: Hun vil bli lege en dag.
english: She wants to become a doctor one day.

norwegian: Toget kommer til å bli forsinket.
english: The train is going to be delayed.

norwegian: Jeg skal møte vennene mine senere.
english: I am going to meet my friends later.

norwegian: De kommer til å flytte neste år.
english: They are going to move next year.

norwegian: Vi skal feire bursdagen hans.
english: We are going to celebrate his birthday.

norwegian: Det skal bli fint vær i helgen.
english: It is going to be nice weather this weekend.

norwegian: Jeg kommer til å savne deg.
english: I am going to miss you.

norwegian: Hun skal begynne på en ny jobb.
english: She is going to start a new job.
